query:
Description:
A close-up photo of a happy black and tan dog outdoors. The dog's face fills most of the image, with its nose near the center, its mouth open, and its tongue hanging out toward the lower left. The background is green and blurred, suggesting grass or plants behind the dog.
answer:
Layer 1: Closest to the viewer are the <ref>tongue</ref><box>[[258, 610, 483, 930]]</box> hanging from the <ref>open mouth</ref><box>[[278, 520, 637, 839]]</box> and the <ref>black nose</ref><box>[[383, 382, 609, 569]]</box> near the center of the dog’s face.

Layer 2: Behind them is the happy <ref>dog face</ref><box>[[70, 24, 870, 998]]</box>, including the <ref>left eye</ref><box>[[260, 214, 345, 318]]</box>, <ref>right eye</ref><box>[[612, 207, 704, 315]]</box>, <ref>left ear</ref><box>[[0, 20, 224, 604]]</box>, and <ref>right ear</ref><box>[[760, 36, 998, 641]]</box>.

Layer 3: Farthest away is the blurred <ref>green outdoor background</ref><box>[[0, 0, 999, 999]]</box> behind the dog.

<pred>protrudes from</pred><box>[[258, 610, 483, 930]]</box><box>[[278, 520, 637, 839]]</box>  
<pred>above</pred><box>[[383, 382, 609, 569]]</box><box>[[278, 520, 637, 839]]</box>  
<pred>left of</pred><box>[[260, 214, 345, 318]]</box><box>[[612, 207, 704, 315]]</box>  
<pred>in front of</pred><box>[[70, 24, 870, 998]]</box><box>[[0, 0, 999, 999]]</box>

1. Question: Which is closer to the viewer, the <ref>tongue</ref><box>[[258, 610, 483, 930]]</box> or the <ref>green outdoor background</ref><box>[[0, 0, 999, 999]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>tongue</ref><box>[[258, 610, 483, 930]]</box> is closer.

2. Question: Which is higher in the image, the <ref>black nose</ref><box>[[383, 382, 609, 569]]</box> or the <ref>open mouth</ref><box>[[278, 520, 637, 839]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>black nose</ref><box>[[383, 382, 609, 569]]</box> is higher.

3. Question: Which is farther left, the <ref>left eye</ref><box>[[260, 214, 345, 318]]</box> or the <ref>right eye</ref><box>[[612, 207, 704, 315]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>left eye</ref><box>[[260, 214, 345, 318]]</box> is farther left.

4. Question: Which is larger, the <ref>dog face</ref><box>[[70, 24, 870, 998]]</box> or the <ref>black nose</ref><box>[[383, 382, 609, 569]]</box>? Answer: The <ref>dog face</ref><box>[[70, 24, 870, 998]]</box> is larger.

query:
Description:
A close-up photo of a white cat resting indoors. The cat's face fills most of the image, with large upright ears, a yellow left eye, a blue right eye, a pink nose near the center, and whiskers extending outward. A soft blanket or fabric appears behind and around the cat.
answer:
Layer 1: Closest are the <ref>pink nose</ref><box>[[485, 595, 575, 675]]</box>, <ref>left whiskers</ref><box>[[80, 590, 470, 760]]</box>, and <ref>right whiskers</ref><box>[[575, 585, 940, 750]]</box>. The <ref>pink nose</ref><box>[[485, 595, 575, 675]]</box> is <pred>between</pred><box>[[485, 595, 575, 675]]</box><box>[[325, 420, 455, 545]]</box> and <box>[[585, 410, 715, 535]]</box>.

Layer 2: The <ref>white cat face</ref><box>[[110, 30, 900, 965]]</box> fills most of the scene, with a <ref>yellow left eye</ref><box>[[325, 420, 455, 545]]</box>, a <ref>blue right eye</ref><box>[[585, 410, 715, 535]]</box>, a <ref>left ear</ref><box>[[120, 0, 355, 305]]</box>, and a <ref>right ear</ref><box>[[650, 0, 890, 320]]</box>. The <ref>left ear</ref><box>[[120, 0, 355, 305]]</box> is <pred>above</pred><box>[[120, 0, 355, 305]]</box><box>[[325, 420, 455, 545]]</box>. The <ref>right ear</ref><box>[[650, 0, 890, 320]]</box> is <pred>above</pred><box>[[650, 0, 890, 320]]</box><box>[[585, 410, 715, 535]]</box>. The <ref>yellow left eye</ref><box>[[325, 420, 455, 545]]</box> is <pred>left of</pred><box>[[325, 420, 455, 545]]</box><box>[[585, 410, 715, 535]]</box>.

Layer 3: Farthest back is the <ref>soft blanket</ref><box>[[0, 0, 999, 999]]</box>. The <ref>white cat face</ref><box>[[110, 30, 900, 965]]</box> is <pred>in front of</pred><box>[[110, 30, 900, 965]]</box><box>[[0, 0, 999, 999]]</box>.

1. Question: Which is closer to the camera, the pink nose or the soft blanket? Answer: The pink nose is closer.
2. Question: Which eye is farther to the right, the yellow left eye or the blue right eye? Answer: The blue right eye is farther to the right.
3. Question: Which object is larger, the white cat face or the pink nose? Answer: The white cat face is larger.
4. Question: Which ear is positioned higher, the left ear or the right ear? Answer: The left ear is slightly higher.
